overview: A 4K sticker gallery website where users can browse a rich collection of high-resolution stickers by category, search by name, view full-resolution previews, and upload their own stickers to grow the community collection.
features: Responsive grid gallery with category filter tabs and search
Full-resolution sticker detail modal with metadata
Sticker upload form with image file picker and metadata fields
Internet Identity login for contributor attribution
Persistent sticker storage using platform file storage
Sample stickers preloaded on first launch
